note: This EPD follows the Biostimulants PCR using modular structure 'Upstream / Core / Downstream' rather than standard EN 15804 A1-A3 modules. No explicit A1-A3 column is given. The production (cradle-to-gate) stage was approximated as Upstream + Core (Downstream = distribution + end-of-life excluded). Values per declared unit of 1 gram. GWP-GHG: Upstream 1.61E-04 + Core 2.22E-04 = 3.83E-04; GWP-fossil: 1.41E-04 + 2.21E-04 = 3.62E-04; GWP-biogenic: -3.85E-05 + 3.75E-06 = -3.475E-05; GWP-total: 1.14E-04 + 2.26E-04 = 3.40E-04. If full life-cycle totals are desired they are 4.67E-04 (GHG), 4.47E-04 (fossil), -3.48E-05 (biogenic) and 4.24E-04 (total).
